title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・“勝ちたい”

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City wins the Tenno Sho (Spring) against
Tamamo Cross!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Watching Tamamo Cross display raw frustration,
Gold City realizes just how preoccupied she's
been by everyone's opinion of her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She hasn't been listening to her own heart. But
now, she hears it scream with the simple desire to
both run and win more.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The racecourse is where she wants to be, and her
manager, moved to tears by the heartfelt joy she
displayed on the track, agrees that she should
continue racing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Next up is the Takarazuka Kinen, the final race of
the Senior Spring Triple Crown and our chance to
show Tamamo Cross what Gold City's really made
of!
